title: Publisher signing: cosign over skill_sha + chip manifest (T13)
deliverable: cosign sign-blob (Fulcio keyless or BYO) over skill_sha; chip manifest signs the set; verify in chipfetch+govd+exod; Sigstore TUF root pinned in deps.lock

acceptance.tri_layer_refusal: unsigned/invalid refuses at chipfetch, govd boot, exod run
